description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat, dark roof and a clean, rectangular structure surrounded by a low fence and lush landscaping with numerous palm trees and shrubs. The front facade is defined by a series of tall, evenly spaced windows and a prominent blue front door accessed by a short staircase and landing. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, lounge seating, and shaded outdoor spaces supported by columns. The side elevations reveal additional windows and a secondary entrance, as well as a small covered structure, possibly a carport or storage area. The property is enclosed by a dark fence, and the grounds are meticulously landscaped with a mix of tropical plants and paved walkways. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open outdoor living and strong geometric lines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with tall windows, a blue front door, and lush landscaping, featuring a pool and spacious patio in the rear. Surrounded by palm trees and a dark fence, it exudes a sleek, contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue door, tall windows, entry steps, and landscaped yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the secondary entrance, additional windows, and a small covered structure near the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open patio, swimming pool, lounge area, and shaded outdoor space with columns.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing more landscaping, the flat roof, and the continuation of the fence and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
